name: EUHOMY 24" Under Counter Dual Zone Bottle Cooler in Stainless Steel, Glass Door
description: Indulge in sophistication with our bottle and beverage refrigerator! Featuring a dual-zone design, the left section ensures constant freshness for beverages while the right side precisely stores bottles. With 7 wooden shelves and a large capacity, you can store up to 21  bottles and 80 beverage cans with ease. Enjoy silent cooling with the low-noise compressor for a tranquil and refreshing experience. Control the intelligent lighting, utilize the temperature memory function, and effortlessly restore the ideal settings with just a press. Equipped with precise sensors and door lock protection, elevate your lifestyle and begin your journey to refined tastes here
